englishDefinitions: Combining all the parts or information into a complete whole.
Making sense of everything and connecting the pieces.
persianTranslation: همهٔ این‌ها را کنار هم گذاشتن
همه چیز را با هم ترکیب کردن
examples: Putting all of this together, the final report looks very strong.
She spent hours putting all of this together for the presentation.
Putting all of this together, we can see why the project failed.
